docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: ESR P/CP Training Automation - Quick Guide
docs.text:
The ESR P/CP training workflow is now around 80% automated and ready for day-to-day use.

Email templates are stored here:

\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Training Hub\Training Templates

Before using the templates, please update the signature at the bottom so it shows your own name.

docs.title: Workflow
docs.text:
1. Use Person _ CP Candidate Request.oft when asking a contractor to provide the list of people who need Person or Competent Person training.
  2. When the contractor returns the completed register, save it in:
\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Training Hub\01_P_CP Candidate Lists
  1. Go to:
\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Safety Document - SFD Register
  1. Double-click either:
Run ESR Training Automation (English).cmd
Run ESR Training Automation (Chinese).cmd
  1. Follow steps 1 to 4 in the tool. Step 5 is still being tested.
  2. The ESR certificate will be generated automatically and saved here:
\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Certificates - CRT\2. Ready to be uploaded
  1. Use the Person Training - Certificate or CP Training - Certificate email template, attach the generated certificate, and send it to the trainee who has passed.

docs.title: What Is Automated
docs.text:
• No manual key-in of trainee details.
  • No manual pass/fail checking; the result is shown on screen.
  • No manual certificate preparation.

The final step, where the email is prepared automatically and left for your review before sending, will be added in a future update.

docs.title: ESR P/CP Training 自動化流程 - 快速使用說明
docs.text:
目前 ESR P/CP Training 流程已完成約 80% 自動化，日常作業已可使用。

相關 email 範本放在：

\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Training Hub\Training Templates

使用前請記得先編輯範本最下方的簽名檔，改成你自己的名字。

docs.title: 操作流程
docs.text:
1. 當需要請廠商提供 Person / Competent Person 訓練名單時，使用 Person _ CP Candidate Request.oft 範本寄信。
  2. 廠商回填後，請把檔案放到：
\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Training Hub\01_P_CP Candidate Lists
  1. 到以下資料夾：
\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Safety Document - SFD Register
  1. 雙擊其中一個工具：
Run ESR Training Automation (English).cmd
Run ESR Training Automation (中文).cmd
  1. 依照工具畫面中的步驟 1 到 4 執行。第 5 步目前仍在測試中。
  2. ESR 證書會自動產生並存放在：
\OAIC Ltd\PROJECT TWSHXESR - Documents\General\Certificates - CRT\2. Ready to be uploaded
  1. 使用 Person Training - Certificate 或 CP Training - Certificate email 範本，把產生好的證書加入附件後，寄給已通過測驗的人員。

docs.title: 已自動化的部分
docs.text:
• 不需要手動 key-in 人員資料。
  • 不需要手動檢查是否通過，結果會直接顯示在畫面上。
  • 不需要手動製作 ESR 證書。

最後一步「自動產生 email，等待你確認後寄出」的功能，後續會再更新。
